title: Show Column Details when Embedding Monday Calendar somewhere
excerpt: We have recently started using Monday for all of our PM and calendar tracking. We have our calendar embedded on our website, but there is no way for our users to see details such as time, location, or other columns that …

posts.author: dhofstee (Darryl H)
posts.cookedHtml: We have recently started using Monday for all of our PM and calendar tracking. We have our calendar embedded on our website, but there is no way for our users to see details such as time, location, or other columns that we have. Would love if there was a way to have an option to embed this info in our website calendar as well.

posts.author: ToshaLackey (Tosha Lackey)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you found a solution for this yet? We would also like to know if this is an option.

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Darryl!

Calendar Plus currently has calendar sharing and embedding available in early access. Send me a message if you’re interested and I can add you to the early access programme. Customers are already using it successfully, just some kinks with larger boards.

Reinier

–
